title: 2026-07-06 Montreal Maple Amber Monday Life
summary: Montreal dry-overcast Monday set using maple amber across Mile End print work, Plateau exterior stairs, a small music-bar doorway, and a triplex balcony home moment.
summaryJa: モントリオールのアルバム。色の軸はメープルアンバー。構成は仕事、階段の待ち合わせ、見られる夜服、バルコニーの家時間。

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman inside a Mile End Montreal print studio, leaning over a long worktable with stacked color proofs, swatches, trays, a paper cutter, brick wall, and high window, sorting paper proofs with both hands while looking down at the work, wearing an open sleeveless ivory linen waistcoat over a white ribbed tank, slate blue-gray capri trousers partly visible below the table, a maple-amber narrow silk scarf tied around one wrist, almond brown ballet flats, small silver hoops, and a simple watch
images.title: 01 Office Mile End print studio capri
images.tags: Slice Of Life Anime / Montreal / office / 25-29
images.locationDetail: Mile End print-studio worktable, brick wall, high window, and paper proof trays in Montreal

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman seated sideways on a Plateau Montreal exterior stair landing, checking a small key ring while waiting for a friend on a leafy brick residential street, wearing a soft white cropped short-sleeve tee, light maple-amber plaid overshirt tied around the waist, washed denim knee-length Bermuda shorts, ribbed cream ankle socks, burgundy-red ballet flats, a small black crossbody pouch, and a simple hair clip
images.title: 02 Street Plateau stair Bermuda flats
images.locationDetail: Plateau Montreal residential street with exterior staircases

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman inside and at the threshold of a small Mile End live-music bar in Montreal at blue hour, warm low doorway light behind her and friends implied near the edge, one knee lifted on a low step while holding a small blank ticket and glancing near camera, wearing a black fine-rib sleeveless square-neck knit top, deep charcoal-black loose parachute trousers with black cord lace-up side lattice openings that reveal narrow flashes of bare skin along the outer legs, soft gathered cuffs, a maple-amber satin scarf belt, a lightweight cropped tobacco-brown shirt jacket carried over one shoulder, plain black low sneakers, a small black shoulder bag, and amber glass earrings
images.title: 03 Music Night Mile End dark lace-up trousers
images.tags: Soft Real Fashion Art / Montreal / music-night / 20-24
images.locationDetail: Mile End small live-music bar entrance in Montreal

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman on a Montreal triplex balcony outside a small kitchen doorway, folding a lightweight shirt over the balcony rail with brick walls, potted herbs, laundry rail, and neighborhood staircases visible, wearing an oatmeal ribbed sleeveless knit top, soft charcoal A-line cotton skirt just below the knee with a small side-button detail, a maple-amber mesh cardigan loosely draped over her shoulders, dark brown leather house sandals, a small amber hair clip, and a delicate ring
images.title: 04 Home Plateau balcony mesh cardigan
images.locationDetail: Plateau Montreal triplex balcony and kitchen doorway
